item.title: European gas prices soar following Qatar LNG strikes
item.description: Europe's TTF benchmark rose 67% last week alone, hitting highest level since early 2023

item.title: BP seals deal to sell German refinery
item.description: The company has pledged to dispose of assets totalling $20 billion by the end of next year

item.title: Greek parliament ratifies Chevron exploration licences
item.description: Energy Minister says final approval 'weakens' Libya-Turkey exclusive economic zone deal

item.title: Major Adnoc oil and gas facilities shut down after missile attack
item.description: The ongoing Middle East war has impacted several facilities operated by Adnoc

item.title: Missile strikes hit multiple QatarEnergy LNG facilities, triggering ‘extensive’ damage in fresh escalation
item.description: Qatar has a nameplate LNG production capacity of 77 million tonnes per annum and is a key natural gas supplier

item.title: Green light for Southeast Asian FPSO field development plan
item.description: Jadestone has secured government approval for its NDUM field development plan

item.title: Sinopec’s engineering arm cheers record $14 billion in new contracts
item.description: Sinopec Oilfield Service Corporation reported strong overseas performance in 2025

item.title: Record Arctic Alaska auction lures ExxonMobil, Shell, Repsol, ConocoPhillips
item.description: BLM says National Petroleum Reserve-Alaska lease sale was strongest ever held for drilling rights in the region

item.title: Oil rises 6% after attacks on Middle East gas facilities
item.description: Brent settles near $110 per barrel, while WTI moves past $98

item.title: QatarEnergy: Missile attacks cause ‘extensive damage’ at Ras Laffan energy facility
item.description: No deaths reported after missile strikes cause fires at Qatari facility

item.title: QatarEnergy: Missile attacks cause ‘extensive damage’ and fires at Ras Laffan energy facility
item.description: No deaths reported after missile strikes cause fires at Qatari facility

item.title: Petrobras makes deepwater gas find offshore Colombia
item.description: Company reported discovery in deep waters 35 kilometres off the country's Caribbean coast

item.title: World's largest gas field attacked in major Middle East escalation
item.description: Iran’s South Pars field, along with Qatar’s extended North Field, on the Qatari side of the Persian Gulf, is by far the world's largest non-associated natural gas field

item.title: Iran to target five Persian Gulf oil and gas facilities 'within hours'
item.description: Tehran warns people close to or working at 'legitimate' targets to evacuate, shortly after Iran's South Pars gas field and a petrochemical complex were hit

item.title: Boots & Coots ready for any Middle East well fire emergency as Iran war continues
item.description: Company outlines its capabilities and how emergency response might happen in the middle of a war

item.title: Australian junior wins Namibia acreage extension
item.description: Pancontinental Energy will need to attract farm-in partner to fulfill critical licence condition,

item.title: Eni takes FIDs on pair of giant Indonesia deepwater projects
item.description: Gas produced from the deepwater Indonesian assets to supply domestic markets and boost LNG exports from 2028

item.title: UK independent targets FID on major new fields within 12 months
item.description: Ithaca targets project sanctions for two major new UK North Sea developments within next year

item.title: Equinor discovers new oil volumes in Barents Sea
item.description: Polynya Tubaen discovery lies 13.6 kilometres away from Johan Castberg

item.title: Norwegian company faces threat of losing field interests
item.description: Lime Petroleum is in a liquidity squeeze due to a field development project in Benin

item.title: ConocoPhillips looks to remove partner in Australian exploration project
item.description: 3D Energi faces a buy-out of its interest in two recent gas discoveries

item.title: Middle East contractors brace for delays as conflict intensifies
item.description: Multiple ongoing EPC tenders and upcoming expansion projects likely to be pushed back, impacting project schedules and commissioning

item.title: Australian indie to create standalone Asian exploration entity
item.description: Triangle Energy subsidiary Tetragon Energy will also target Asian oil and gas opportunities

item.title: Indonesia proposes potential gas buyer for giant Abadi LNG project
item.description: Sovereign wealth fund could purchase volumes from Inpex project

item.title: Woodside names Westcott as permanent CEO after O’Neill’s departure for BP
item.description: Australian energy major had been hoping to find new leader by end of first quarter

item.title: Woodside names its permanent CEO after O’Neill’s departure for BP
item.description: Australian energy major had been hoping to find new leader by end of first quarter

item.title: Woodside names permanent CEO after O’Neill’s departure for BP
item.description: Australian energy major had been hoping to find new leader by end of first quarter

item.title: Oil rises 3% after attacks in UAE cause more Middle East disruption
item.description: Brent up to $104 per barrel, WTI rises to $96

item.title: Petrofac sells engineering unit to US-based investor group
item.description: Mason Capital Management, Pearlstone Alternative pick up Petrofac Emirates

item.title: Petrofac sells key business unit to US-based investor group
